core_offer: AI-powered creator data solution for influencer marketing — find, analyze, and evaluate creators across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube
products: Creator Discovery — find influencers by audience filters, engagement, geo, interests, content topics
Creator Analytics — deep influencer metrics + audience insights (demographics, psychographics, brand affinity)
Social Data API — programmatic access to creator/audience data
Sponsored Posts tracking — find paid posts by hashtags, mentions, brand handles
target_audience: Influencer marketing platforms, agencies, brands, tech companies, research companies
value_proposition: Best-in-market influencer discovery with audience-level data (demographics, psychographics, geo) for data-driven creator selection

key_metrics.data_types: engagement rates, audience reachability, demographics, psychographics, brand affinity
key_metrics.discovery_type: content-first (what creators talk about, not just keywords)
